description: UNESCO World Heritage site with limestone karsts.
text: Ha Long Bay in Quang Ninh is a nature destination. UNESCO World Heritage site with limestone karsts. Best time to visit is Oct-Apr. Activities include cruise, kayak.

description: Less crowded bay with limestone islands.

description: One of the most scenic passes in Vietnam.

description: Deep canyon along Nho Que river.
